menu_import_keybox_desc: Downloads and installs remote keybox to Tricky Store
menu_force_clear_desc: Kill droidguard, force-stop and clear Play Store, GMS, GSF, Chrome, SafetyCore, and more
menu_target_desc: Fully regenerates Tricky Store target.txt with all installed apps
menu_patch_desc: Writes spoofed security patch date to Tricky Store
menu_pif_update_desc: Detects your PIF variant and fetches the latest fingerprint
menu_custom_keybox_desc: Use your own keybox file, URL, or device path
advance_clear_all_detection_traces_desc: Deletes detector app data, log files, temp directories, and cleaning system caches
advance_fix_pif_desc: Disables PIHook/PixelProps spoof modules and cleans persist props from PIF spoof engines
advance_kill_all_desc: Force-stops and clears data for all known detector, GMS, remote control, and tool apps
control_toggle_action_pif_desc: Run Play Integrity Fix auto-update scripts
control_conflicts_desc: Toggle ON = module handles it. Toggle OFF = Specter handles it. Remove conflicting modules from your root manager if you encounter issues.
custom_kb_desc: Paste a download URL or enter a device path
toast_enter_url: Enter a URL or device path
custom_kb_file_desc: Select a keybox XML file from your device
danger_confirm_msg: This action may affect your device. Are you sure?
history_empty: No activity yet - run an action to get started
advance_set_hma_desc: Downloads HMA-OSS / HMA / HMAL anti-detection config with proper permissions, falls back to built-in template
advance_set_pif_desc: Runs Play Integrity Fix auto-update scripts
advance_scan_clean_props_desc: Scans and removes persistent props from LSPosed, HyperCeiler, LuckyTool, and similar modding tools
advance_wdevinel1_desc: Installs attestation keys for Widevine L1 DRM (Qualcomm devices only)
control_toggle_action_gms_desc: Force-stop and clear Play Store, GMS, and DroidGuard processes
control_toggle_action_target_desc: Merge new installed apps into Tricky Store target.txt
control_toggle_action_security_patch_des: Write spoofed security patch date to Tricky Store
control_toggle_boot_hardening_desc: Harden SELinux enforce, /proc permissions, install-recovery.sh, and spoof bootmode
settings_dev_mode_desc: Show raw script names and terminal output
tools_danger_zone_desc: Destructive operations that may affect your device
update_desc: Stay up to date with the latest Specter releases and bug fixes.
update_note: Join Telegram or check GitHub for contributions and technical discussions.
control_toggle_adb_disabler_desc: Disable USB debugging, developer options, and OEM unlock at boot
control_toggle_rom_fingerprint_desc: Clean custom ROM identity from build properties at boot
adb_disabler_dialog_desc: Choose which developer settings to disable at boot.
adb_disabler_dev_options_desc: Disables developer options toggle in Settings
adb_disabler_usb_debug_desc: Disables ADB, strips adb from USB config, locks OEM unlock
adb_disabler_oem_unlock_desc: Hides OEM unlock toggle from developer options
boot_harden_bootmode_desc: Spoof bootmode away from "recovery" to hide recovery status
rom_fingerprint_dialog_desc: Clean traces of custom ROM identity from build properties.
rom_fingerprint_hexpatch_desc: Delete build props containing known ROM names (Lineage, crDroid, PixelOS, etc.)
rom_fingerprint_prefix_desc: Strip custom ROM prefixes (aosp_, lineage_) from build fingerprint and display id
prop_handler_dialog_desc: Manage boot-time property spoofing and cleanup.
prop_handler_boot_state_desc: Lock bootloader state, verifiedboot, flash.locked, build type/tags
prop_handler_spoof_build_desc: Spoof ro.build.flavor to remove userdebug/eng traces
prop_handler_region_desc: Apply region-specific persist props (IMS, VoLTE, locale)
gms_dialog_desc: Choose which GMS cleanup actions to run when triggered.
gms_force_stop_desc: Kill droidguard and force-stop Play Store, GMS, GSF, Chrome, SafetyCore, and related GMS processes
gms_clear_data_desc: Run pm clear on Play Store to reset its state
control_toggle_action_keybox_desc: Download and install a valid keybox from the catalog
control_toggle_vbmeta_desc: Apply AVB vbmeta properties (digest, version, hash algorithm) at boot
control_toggle_prop_handler_desc: Boot state props, build spoofing, and suspicious props cleanup
control_auto_target_desc: Watch for new app installs and auto-add to target.txt
auto_target_desc: Automatically watches for newly installed apps and adds them to Tricky Store target.txt.
auto_target_interval_desc: How often to check for new apps. Minimum 1 second.
boot_harden_dialog_desc: Choose which hardening measures to apply at boot.
boot_hash_desc: Override vbmeta digest with a custom boot hash
boot_hash_info: Leave empty to use auto-computed boot hash. The hash is a 64-character hex string.
boot_hash_termux_hint: To get your boot hash from TEE, install specter.apk and run in Termux:
restore_backups_desc: Restores your original Tricky Store files from the first-boot backup
